name: Fruit Leather
recipeInstructions: Cook the fruit in enough water to cover until very soft. Drain. Mix in other ingredients. Puree in a food processor fitted with steel blade or in a blender. Spread no more than ¼ inch thick on a well‑greased cookie sheet (grease the edges as well). Leave in the oven set on the lowest temperature (or just the pilot light in gas ovens) for at least 6 hours or overnight. Cut into 3×4-inch pieces and roll up in pieces of wax paper. Store in a sealed container in the refrigerator or freezer until needed.
